title: Talking Tables Souk Recycled Glass Bud Vase, Clear, 10Cm
features: Our Souk Clear Recycled Glass Bud Vase is perfect for displaying fresh, scented flowers, the ultimate finishing touch to a well thought out tablescape, by Talking Tables.
HOW TO STYLE - We love brightly coloured flowers, displayed in a trio of bud vases and spaced out along the table. For something more refined, try a single rose in each, snipped to size.
SIZE - 10cm x 6.5cm, a delicate vessel designed to last.
ECO-FRIENDLY - Crafted in India, this vase features a distinctive ribbed texture and is made from recycled glass.

TALKING TABLES - The desire to bring people together lies at the heart of everything we do at Talking Tables. It’s something that feels even more poignant having recently experienced long periods of pandemic isolation. However, we’re constantly thinking about how we can lower our impact on the planet and party like there is a tomorrow. We’d love you to join our table...
description: From the manufacturer The Inspiration for this collection Talking Tables founder, Clare Harris, was inspired by her most recent trip to Morocco, where she fell in love with the beautiful colours and patterns found within the famous bazaar markets. Every product in the range is Plastic Free and can be reused or recycled. The collection encompasses designs of the Moroccan souks, including the geometric tile patterns, intertwining wonderful shades of blue and yellow. With the effortless addition of the Souk paper plates, paper napkins, upcycled fabric bunting, rugs and many more souk inspired products, an outdoor space, dinner table or party can be elevated and take you thousands of miles away to the warmth and beauty of Morocco. BCORP APPROVED COMPANY Talking Tables is a certified B Corporation, which is the Gold Standard for companies that meet the highest verified social and environmental standards and who are committed to creating positive change. TALKING TABLES TEAM We are a company that enjoys getting together and we love designing products to be enjoyed surrounded by friends and family. Here is a few of the team enjoying a summer social event, it was was a lovely sunny day in London ''Not a drop of rain, which made a nice change' A FEMALE FOUNDED COMPANY Talking Tables was founded by, Clare Harris in 1999 when she noticed that there were no design-led party products on offer for her millennium celebrations. We're partnering with the amazing charity Re-engage Talking Tables believes time together is the best of times. But for many elderly people their social connections diminish over the years and loneliness becomes the norm. This is why we’re partnering with the amazing charity Re-engage Founded in 1965, Re-engage is a national charity dedicated to tackling social isolation and loneliness in older people living on their own, with a special focus on the over 75s. We work nationally with the charity Re-engage via their volunteer-led tea parties.
